description: The manufacturer has initiated a non-safety 'service campaign' (e.g., a software update to improve transmission smoothness). The dealership needs to contact affected customers.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all dealership customers whose vehicles are covered by the new service campaign.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of 250 affected customers.

nodes.task_description: Initiate an outreach program (email or phone call) to inform customers about the free update and its benefits.

expected_outcome.value: Agent launches an email campaign to the generated list.

nodes.task_description: As customers respond, schedule appointments for them to have the update performed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules appointments for customers who call in response to the email.
